expectations.text: three_files_exist - spec.md, plan.md, acceptance.md all exist in a specs/ subdirectory
expectations.evidence: All three files exist at specs/project-analytics/spec.md, specs/project-analytics/plan.md, specs/project-analytics/acceptance.md within the outputs/specs/ subdirectory.

expectations.text: ears_format - spec.md uses EARS patterns (keywords: WHEN, THEN, WHILE, ~해야 한다, ~하면 안 된다)
expectations.evidence: REQ-02: "WHEN 사용자가 ... 실행하면, THEN 해당 프로젝트의 모든 실행 이력을 ... 출력해야 한다"; REQ-03/REQ-04/REQ-06 also use WHEN/THEN. Korean EARS: "자동 기록해야 한다" (REQ-01), "중단시키면 안 된다" (REQ-N01), "사용하면 안 된다" (REQ-N02), "주면 안 된다" (REQ-N03). WHILE keyword not present but not required since multiple other EARS patterns are used.

expectations.text: requirement_ids - spec.md has structured requirement IDs (REQ-01, REQ-N01, REQ-O01, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Core: REQ-01 through REQ-06; Negative/prohibition: REQ-N01, REQ-N02, REQ-N03; Optional: REQ-O01, REQ-O02, REQ-O03. All three ID prefixes present with sequential numbering.

expectations.text: fsd_layer_mapping - spec.md has a table mapping affected FSD layers/slices
expectations.evidence: Section '## FSD 레이어 매핑' contains a markdown table with columns 레이어/슬라이스/변경 유형/설명, mapping shared/db/ (신규), entities/analytics/ (신규), features/track_analytics/ (신규), app/cli.py (수정), pipelines/ (수정).

expectations.text: risk_tagging - plan.md has LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH risk classification on tasks
expectations.evidence: Task table (작업 분해) has '위험도' column with tasks 1-7,9-13 marked LOW and tasks 8 marked MEDIUM. Separate '위험 분석' table also uses MEDIUM and LOW impact ratings. Note: HIGH risk is not present, but the classification system using LOW/MEDIUM is clearly applied.

expectations.text: gwt_scenarios - acceptance.md has at least 2 Given/When/Then scenarios
expectations.evidence: acceptance.md contains 14 Given/When/Then scenarios across REQ-01 (4 scenarios), REQ-02 (2 scenarios), REQ-03 (2 scenarios), REQ-04 (1 scenario), REQ-05 (1 scenario), REQ-06 (2 scenarios), REQ-N01 (2 scenarios). Each uses explicit Given/When/Then markers.

expectations.text: quality_gates - acceptance.md includes lint/test/FSD verification checklist
expectations.evidence: Section '## 품질 게이트' contains checklist items: ruff check, ruff format --check, mypy type check on specific paths, lint-imports FSD rule check, pytest on specific test files, in-memory SQLite unit test coverage, and full pytest regression check.

expectations.text: korean_body - Main body is in Korean, only code identifiers in English
expectations.evidence: All section headings (배경, 요구사항, 핵심 요구사항, 금지사항, 선택사항, 제약 조건, 의존성), descriptions, and explanatory text are in Korean. English is used only for code identifiers (project_name, pipeline_type, sqlite3, click, rich), file paths (shared/db/connection.py), CLI commands (uv run video-automation analytics show), and technical terms (SQLite, ISO 8601, Pydantic, FSD).
